metadata.title: Dependency Management - Sources
metadata.description: Primary sources for lockfiles, reproducible builds, vulnerability management, SBOMs, AI BOM, and supply-chain security

package_managers.name: npm Documentation
package_managers.description: Official npm docs (install, lockfiles, workspaces, auditing)

package_managers.name: Poetry Documentation
package_managers.description: Poetry dependency management and lockfile usage

package_managers.name: uv Documentation (Astral)
package_managers.description: Fast Python package manager that can replace pip/virtualenv in many workflows; verify current feature parity vs Poetry for your use case

package_managers.name: Bun Package Manager
package_managers.description: JavaScript runtime with built-in package manager; verify current ecosystem maturity and compatibility for production use

vulnerability_management.name: Open Source Vulnerabilities (OSV)
vulnerability_management.description: Open vulnerability database and API for OSS ecosystems

vulnerability_management.name: GitHub Advisory Database
vulnerability_management.description: Security advisories for open source vulnerabilities

supply_chain_security.name: SLSA v1.0 Specification
supply_chain_security.description: Supply-chain Levels for Software Artifacts (build provenance)

supply_chain_security.name: Sigstore
supply_chain_security.description: Signing and verifying software artifacts (cosign, fulcio, rekor)

supply_chain_security.name: OpenSSF Scorecard
supply_chain_security.description: Automated security health metrics for open source projects

supply_chain_security.name: CISA SBOM Resources
supply_chain_security.description: CISA SBOM minimum elements and federal requirements (2025 update)

supply_chain_security.name: EU Cyber Resilience Act (CRA)
supply_chain_security.description: EU regulation requiring SBOMs for software products (effective Dec 2027)

tools.name: Syft (SBOM generator)
tools.description: Generate SBOMs from container images and filesystems

tools.name: Grype (vulnerability scanner)
tools.description: Scan container images and filesystems for known vulnerabilities

tools.name: Dependabot
tools.description: Automated dependency updates and security alerts

tools.name: Socket.dev
tools.description: Supply chain security platform detecting malicious packages

tools.name: OWASP Dependency-Track
tools.description: Continuous SBOM analysis platform for component risk identification

ai_supply_chain.name: Endor Labs - State of Dependency Management 2025
ai_supply_chain.description: Research on AI coding agent risks in software supply chain

ai_supply_chain.name: AI BOM Concept (SD Times)
ai_supply_chain.description: Extended SBOM for AI-native systems (models, datasets, training artifacts)

optional_ai.name: Automated PR triage and summarization (Optional)
optional_ai.description: Optional AI assistance for PR summaries (requires human review; product features vary)
